body: Seasonal checklist for servicing the church boiler and furnace: change filters, check pilot and thermocouple, bleed radiators, and log pressure readings before winter.
title: Furnace & Boiler Maintenance Checklist

body: How to clear the sidewalks, steps, and parking lot after a snowfall, when to apply ice melt, and where the salt and shovels are stored in the maintenance closet.
title: Snow Removal & Salting Guide
